issues.message: Source file not found. Batch input source_file is null. Data entry points to vendor/page-constructor/src/components/CardBase/CardBase.tsx but no Layout component directory exists in vendor/page-constructor/src/components/.

description_pairs.source_description: Button component wrapping @gravity-ui/uikit Button with support for special themes (app-store, google-play, github, scale, monochrome), icon/image attachments with left/right positioning, URL TLD substitution, and analytics event tracking.
description_pairs.data_description: Button component for page-constructor with support for various themes, sizes, and image/icon attachments. Supports App Store and Google Play platform badges.

description_pairs.source_description: Forward-ref component rendering a native HTML5 <video> element with optional custom bar controls (mute/play-pause). Accepts a MediaVideoProps video config and exposes the underlying HTMLVideoElement ref.
Conditional wrapper that shows an error state (message + retry button) when isError is true, or renders its children when false.
description_pairs.data_description: The ErrorWrapper component is used to gracefully handle and display local errors in UI sections. When the isError flag is set to true, it shows an error message and an optional retry button. When isError is false, it renders its children content.

description_pairs.source_description: Low-level image primitive that delegates to a custom Image component from ImageContext when provided, or falls back to a native tag. Forwards all ImageObjectProps fields plus style, className, onClick, onLoad, onError.

Link component supporting four themes: 'back' (renders BackLink), 'file-link' and 'underline' (renders FileLink), 'normal' (renders <a> with optional arrow icon). Supports URL TLD substitution and analytics tracking.
description_pairs.data_description: Link component for page-constructor with support for various themes including back, file-link, underline, and normal.

description_pairs.source_description: Map component that renders either YandexMap or GoogleMap based on the MapType from MapsContext. Accepts MapProps which is a union of GMapProps (requires address) and YMapProps (requires markers and id).
description_pairs.data_description: Map component that supports both Yandex Maps and Google Maps based on the MapsContext configuration.

description_pairs.source_description: Composite media component that renders one of: image (with parallax/fullscreen support), video (default or player type), YouTube/videoIframe embed, DataLens chart, or Iframe. Supports video microdata injection for SEO.

Two-column layout block combining a media slot (children, with optional Card sub-component) and a MediaContent text panel. Supports media/content direction, large-media mode, media-only mode, and scroll-triggered animation.
